title: Classify Nucleo full-app runtime stalls
description: After fixing Nucleo Renode LoRa linkage, gateway and puck link and connect to lichen-sim but fail late runtime oracles. Gateway stops logging after lora_l2 initialized. Puck arms IWDG, Renode lacks the generated reset macro, then reads vectors from zero and halts. Reproduce with canonical board script semantics and capture symbolized execution before changing firmware.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Retain exact ELF/config hashes, Renode 1.16.1 scripts, UART/model logs, and guest timestamps. 2. Run with cpu PerformanceInMips 48 and registered reset macro. 3. Capture symbolized gateway PC/SP and thread states after lora_l2 init. 4. Capture puck PC/thread and feed timer before IWDG expiry; compare once with watchdog disabled only as a diagnostic. 5. Classify harness/reset-model, IWDG-model, or firmware stall and link a repair. 6. No late oracle is weakened.
notes: Completed 2026-07-16 with Renode 1.16.1 and production ELFs recorded on project-LICHEN-oqv7.3. Canonical 48-MIPS/reset-macro reruns retained in /var/folders/pg/t21pc_0j6_3bq40d087mjbrw0000gn/T/opencode/fix-now-nucleo-runtime. Gateway classification: no firmware stall; after main returns, GDB captured PC=0x0801408a in arch_cpu_idle, SP=0x20006ee0, current thread=0x20002578 with thread_state=0, and a healthy idle backtrace. Gateway is passive, so unsolicited radio TX is not an app-valid oracle. Puck classification: prior PC/SP zero was a missing reset-macro harness failure. With canonical reset macro, the unchanged production ELF resets/reloads about every 100 ms. Zephyr wdt_iwdg_stm32 auto-starts CONFIG_IWDG_STM32_INITIAL_TIMEOUT=100 during POST_KERNEL; puck main later requests 4000 ms and 500 ms feeds but is not reached first. Replacing only Renode IWDG with inert MMIO lets the same ELF pass 1 s, initialize L2, and read identity without reset. CONFIG_WATCHDOG=n diagnostic was rejected because puck still references the DTS watchdog and does not link. Root cause is pre-main 100 ms auto-arm, not LoRa linkage. Repair project-LICHEN-5ix1.5 created; late oracles unchanged.
close_reason: Classified gateway as expected idle and puck as 100 ms pre-main watchdog auto-start; linked repair project-LICHEN-5ix1.5.
